annotations.title: Spa World Houston - Korean Spa & Sauna

content.text:
If you're seeking alternatives to The Woodhouse Day Spa in the Katy and Houston area, here are several reputable options to consider:

**[MedSpa at Villagio](http://medspaatvillagio.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (478 reviews)**  
_22764 Westheimer Pkwy # 690, Katy, TX 77450_  
Combines traditional spa services with medical aesthetics, offering treatments like Botox, dermal fillers, laser hair removal, and microneedling.

**[Houstonian Trellis Spa](https://www.trellisspa.com/?utm_medium=Search&utm_campaign=local&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Spa · 4.2 (544 reviews)**  
_111 N Post Oak Ln, Houston, TX 77024_  
A Forbes Four-Star rated spa situated at The Houstonian Hotel, offering custom massages, advanced skincare, hydrotherapy, and fitness classes in an elegant environment.

**[Spa World Houston - Korean Spa & Sauna](https://spaworldhouston.com/?utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=google_business_profile&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Spa · 4.2 (1282 reviews)**  
_929 Westgreen Blvd, Katy, TX 77450_  
A Korean-style spa and sauna featuring various therapy rooms, hot tubs, and relaxation lounges. Provides a unique cultural spa experience.

**[Organic Spa Houston (Museum District)](https://organic-spa-houston.zoca.com/?utm_medium=googlemapsprofile&utm_campaign=googlemaps&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Day spa · $$ · 4.8 (241 reviews)**  
_5305 Jackson St, Houston, TX 77004_  
Specializes in organic skincare and beauty treatments, including facials, brow and lash services, and permanent makeup, using vegan-friendly and paraben-free products.

Each of these spas offers a unique experience, so consider your specific preferences and desired treatments when making a selection.
